# =============================================================================
# HU 200 BB preflop ranges — single source of truth for the dataset pipeline.
# =============================================================================
#
# FORMAT
# ------
#   === SPOT_NAME ===
#   ALL:    <paste range string here>
#   RAISE:  <paste range string here>
#   CALL:   <paste range string here>
#   FOLD:   <paste range string here>
#
# Each spot has up to 4 actions: ALL, RAISE, CALL, FOLD. Leave an action's
# value blank (no lines after the marker until the next marker) if it does
# not apply to that spot.
#
# Each range string uses postflop-solver weighted-combo notation:
#   XxYy: weight, XxYy: weight, ...
# The weight is the frequency of that action with that specific combo.
# Combos not listed are assumed to have weight 0 for that action.
#
# A range string may span multiple lines (line breaks inside a range are
# joined with a single space; comma-separated tokens parse correctly across
# wraps).
#
# Lines starting with `#` are comments and are ignored.
#
# SPOT KEYS
# ---------
#   SB_FIRST_ACTION  - SB's first preflop decision
#                      ALL   = all 1326 combos dealt
#                      RAISE = SB raises (open)        -> postflop SRP/3BP/4BP
#                      CALL  = SB limps                -> postflop limped pot
#                      FOLD  = SB folds (terminal)
#
#   BB_VS_SB_RAISE   - BB facing SB's raise
#                      RAISE = BB 3-bets               -> postflop 3BP
#                      CALL  = BB calls                -> postflop SRP
#                      FOLD  = BB folds (terminal)
#
#   SB_VS_BB_3BET    - SB facing BB's 3-bet
#                      RAISE = SB 4-bets               -> postflop 4BP
#                      CALL  = SB calls                -> postflop 3BP
#                      FOLD  = SB folds (terminal)
#
#   BB_VS_SB_4BET    - BB facing SB's 4-bet
#                      RAISE = BB 5-bets               -> rare at 200 BB
#                      CALL  = BB calls                -> postflop 4BP
#                      FOLD  = BB folds (terminal)
#
#   BB_VS_SB_LIMP    - BB facing SB's limp
#                      RAISE = BB iso-raises           -> postflop limp-raise
#                      CALL  = BB checks (free)        -> postflop limped pot
#                      FOLD  = N/A (checking is free)
#
# After editing this file, run:
#   cargo run --release --example verify_hu_ranges
# to confirm every non-empty range parses and the per-decision-node action
# weights sum to <= 1 per combo (a sanity check that catches export drift).
#
# =============================================================================

=== SB_FIRST_ACTION ===
ALL:
RAISE:
